case_title: JI HOON LEE VS. JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ AGUAS

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT RETURNED UNCLAIMED BY DEFENDANT.
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: OCTOBER 12, 2010).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JI HOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUAS, JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ $2,905.49 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,990.49, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $7263.73 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES, AND PERSONAL INJURIES, AND ATTRIBUTES 60% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-22-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT AGUAS, JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ
